title: Decorative Ladders
description: Adds 3D Ladder variants of Wood blocks to the game, with Resource Pack support!
body:
Adds 3D Ladders based on athe Wood Blocks in Vanilla Minecraft with vanilla resource pack support (See [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/decorative-ladders/gallery) for examples)

The mod ladders behave almost exactly as vanilla ladders, but they can also be waterlogged!

To craft these ladders, all you have to do is take a wood type (Planks, Logs, Stripped Logs)
and place them in an H shape in a 3x3 crafting grid:

![Oakplanks in an H shape inside a 3x3 crafting grid, producing 7 Oak Plank Ladders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd26fa015dc740765988bb12f50493f496c48ad8.png)
